markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's proposed content strategy and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Approved:** GrowthX's 5-cluster strategy was approved. It shifts focus from technical thought leadership to high-volume, top/middle-of-funnel content (e.g., listicles, comparisons) to build an organic flywheel and influence AI search.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [**Immediate Priority:** The "Shadow AI & Governance" cluster will be prioritized to address urgent market needs and position Hex as the solution.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [**Collaboration Needed:** Hex is already building competitor comparison content. The teams will sync to align efforts and avoid duplication.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [**Brand Alignment:** Hex's brand design lead (Annie) will meet with GrowthX's designer (Katya) to ensure AI-generated featured images match brand guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Rationale

  - [**Goal:** Shift from expensive paid social to an organic content flywheel that drives traffic and users, while influencing AI search results (e.g., Perplexity, ChatGPT).](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [**Challenge:** Current content is too technical, creating a review bottleneck and limiting top/middle-of-funnel reach.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Solution:** A topic cluster approach to build authority and scale content production to \~5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Start with less technical content to accelerate production. As GrowthX learns the industry, pipelines will adapt to more technical topics.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)

### Proposed Topic Clusters

1.  **Competitor Alternatives & Comparisons:**
      - [**Why:** Directly influences AI search rankings and provides a clear narrative for LLMs on Hex's differentiation.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Note:** Hex is already building this content. The teams will collaborate to optimize it.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
2.  **AI & Data Analytics:**
      - [**Why:** Broad T/M-o-F topics to capture high-volume keywords and link to existing, high-quality thought leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
3.  **Modern Data Viz & Business Intelligence:**
      - [**Why:** Capture keywords from competitors (Tableau, Databricks) and reframe Hex as a tool for business users.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
      - [**Focus:** Spotlight features like Data Apps, Threads, and Embedded Analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
4.  **Data Engineering & Infrastructure:**
      - [**Why:** Address themes from competitor content (Databricks, Google Cloud).](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
      - [**Focus:** Position Hex's Notebooks as enabling analysts/scientists to perform basic engineering tasks for self-serve analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=1318.0)
5.  **Shadow AI & Data Trust:**
      - [**Why:** Address the risk of unauthorized employee use of LLMs (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude) and position Hex's Threads and Data Apps as the governance solution.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
      - [**Priority:** This cluster will be launched immediately.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### AI Visibility & Performance Tracking

  - [**Scrunch Dashboard:** Tracks Hex's visibility in LLM responses vs. competitors (Power BI, Tableau, Databricks, Looker).](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
      - [**Current State:** Hex has a 2% citation rate (LLM links to site), while competitors are at \~10%. This is expected given their larger content libraries.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=2047.0)
  - [**Looker Dashboard:** A 7-page report will track performance using data from Google Search Console and GA4.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=2101.0)
      - [**Key Features:** An LLM referral report and a cohort report to track the performance of individual clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=2101.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Hex Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=2303.0)
      - [Review and comment on the initial artifacts (Company Context, Personas, Guidelines) in Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=2308.0)
      - [Share internal competitor analysis docs with Aida to align efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
      - [Schedule a meeting between Annie (Hex Brand Design Lead) and Katya (GrowthX Designer) to align on featured image production.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
      - [Conduct keyword research for the approved topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
      - [Present 50–80 blog ideas in the content calendar next week.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
      - [Build the Looker performance dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/NcZ37HwFpNCzyyBN5xyM3wAkbth53514?tab=summary&timestamp=2101.0)
